languages.text: "Лария верно заметила, что нам стоит положиться на своих людей и действовать осторожно".

traits.locale_text: "Лария верно заметила, что нам стоит положиться на своих людей и действовать осторожно".

languages.text: "Laria was right to point out that we should trust in our people and proceed with caution."
languages.original_text: "Лария верно заметила, что нам стоит положиться на своих людей и действовать осторожно".

traits.locale_text: "Laria was right to point out that we should trust in our people and proceed with caution."
"Laria was right to point out that we should trust in our people and proceed with caution."
"Laria was right to point out that we should trust in our people and proceed with caution."

languages.text: “菈丽雅说得对。我们应当信任民众，谨慎行事。”
languages.original_text: "Laria was right to point out that we should trust in our people and proceed with caution."

traits.locale_text: “菈丽雅说得对。我们应当信任民众，谨慎行事。”

languages.text: « Laria a raison, nous devrions faire confiance aux autres serviteurs et faire preuve de prudence. »
languages.original_text: "Laria was right to point out that we should trust in our people and proceed with caution."

traits.locale_text: « Laria a raison, nous devrions faire confiance aux autres serviteurs et faire preuve de prudence. »

languages.text: «Laria estaba en lo cierto al sugerir confiar en nuestra gente y actuar con cautela».
languages.original_text: "Laria was right to point out that we should trust in our people and proceed with caution."

traits.locale_text: «Laria estaba en lo cierto al sugerir confiar en nuestra gente y actuar con cautela».

languages.text: "Laria, insanlarımıza güvenmemiz ve dikkatli ilerlememiz gerektiğini belirtmekte haklıydı."
languages.original_text: "Laria was right to point out that we should trust in our people and proceed with caution."

traits.locale_text: "Laria, insanlarımıza güvenmemiz ve dikkatli ilerlememiz gerektiğini belirtmekte haklıydı."

languages.text: "Laria hatte recht, als sie sagte, wir sollten unseren Leuten vertrauen und vorsichtig vorgehen."
languages.original_text: "Laria was right to point out that we should trust in our people and proceed with caution."

traits.locale_text: "Laria hatte recht, als sie sagte, wir sollten unseren Leuten vertrauen und vorsichtig vorgehen."

languages.text: 「ラリアが指摘したように、私たちは国民を信じ、慎重に進めるべきだ」
languages.original_text: "Laria was right to point out that we should trust in our people and proceed with caution."

traits.locale_text: 「ラリアが指摘したように、私たちは国民を信じ、慎重に進めるべきだ」
